# Obligatory AI Generation Comment Guideline

Use this obligatory rule whenever creating new files or classes.

## Mandatory text

Include this exact text:

`generated by AI in Github cloud`

## Rules

- Add the text near the top of every newly created file.
- Add the text in or directly above each newly created class definition.
- Keep the text exactly unchanged for consistency and auditability.
